narrative:
Matamoras / Grandview (precinct in Washington County) has 975 registered voters, with 60.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.5%, a modest Republican lean of 2.8 percentage points.
